DormTel
My Dorm, My Home
Dormitory Operations Automation Platform
Stakeholder Demo — May 2026
The Challenge
Why Dormitory Operators
Need Automation
📱

Scattered Inquiries

Leads lost across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, walk-ins, and phone calls

📊

Billing Errors

Manual spreadsheet calculations with electric, water, and rent splits

💸

Payment Chaos

Reconciling GCash, Maya, bank transfers takes hours daily

👁

Zero Visibility

No real-time view of occupancy, revenue, or pending tasks

📝

Manual Move-Outs

Clearance, final billing, and refunds lost in chat threads and paperwork

The Solution
5 Integrated Modules
1

Smart Inquiry Hub

Multi-channel capture, AI scoring, pipeline tracking

2

Digital Onboarding

Room search, reservation, payment links, activation

3

Auto-Billing Engine

Meter readings, split calculations, approval workflow

4

Payment Gateway

GCash/Maya webhooks, auto-reconciliation, DSR

5

Move-Out Settlement

Clearance, final billing, refund tracking, audit trail

Technology
Built for Philippine Dormitories
⚡

FastAPI Backend

Python 3.12 async API with PostgreSQL 15 + Redis caching

🎨

React Frontend

Modern responsive UI accessible from any device

💳

Payment Webhooks

Direct GCash & Maya integration for instant reconciliation

☁

Cloud Deployed

Docker containers on secure VPS with automated backups

Module Overview
Operations Dashboard
1
Today's Revenue
Real-time total from all payment channels (₱41,015 today)
2
Inquiry Count
New inquiries awaiting response across all channels
3
Occupancy Metrics
Total reservations and scheduled move-ins at a glance
4
Quick Actions
One-click navigation to any task: billing, inquiries, DSR
🟢 LIVE
Dashboard
Module 1
Smart Inquiry Hub
1
Multi-Channel Capture
Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, walk-ins, and phone
2
AI Sentiment Score
Automatic tone analysis rates each message 0–1
3
Lead Priority Score
Scoring from 0–100 prioritizes follow-up order
4
Pipeline Status
Track: New, Responded, Escalated, Converted
🟢 LIVE
Module 1
Module 1
Create New Inquiry
1
Source Channel
Select the channel where the inquiry originated
2
Message Content
Paste the actual inquiry message for AI analysis
3
Auto-Scoring
System automatically calculates sentiment and lead score
4
Instant Pipeline
New inquiries enter the pipeline immediately
🟢 LIVE
Module 1
Module 2
Digital Onboarding — Rooms
1
25 Rooms, 3 Buildings
Tower A, Tower B, Tower C with capacity tracking
2
Live Occupancy
See occupied beds vs capacity for every room
3
Rate Per Bed
Monthly rates displayed for instant quoting
4
Room Status
Available, occupied, and maintenance states
🟢 LIVE
Module 2
Module 2
New Reservation Form
1
Smart Room Search
Type to filter rooms by number or building name
2
ID Verification
Government ID type and number captured digitally
3
Auto Payment Link
GCash/Maya payment link generated on submission
4
One-Click Activation
Convert reservation to active resident instantly
🟢 LIVE
Module 2
Module 3
Auto-Billing Engine
1
Period-Based Billing
Monthly billing cycles with full charge breakdown
2
Itemized Charges
Rent + Electric + Water + Other clearly separated
3
Status Workflow
Draft, Pending Approval, Distributed, Paid
4
Variance Detection
Flags unusual consumption for manager review
🟢 LIVE
Module 3
Module 3
Generate Billing
1
Building Filter
Generate for specific building or all buildings
2
Meter Readings
Enter electric and water totals for auto-split
3
Proportional Split
System divides utility costs across all residents
4
Approval Required
Manager must approve before distribution
🟢 LIVE
Module 3
Module 4
Payment Reconciliation — DSR
1
Daily Sales Report
Real-time revenue: ₱41,015 from 5 transactions today
2
Multi-Gateway Support
GCash, Maya, bank transfers, and cash
3
Unmatched Payments
Flagged payments awaiting resident matching
4
Auto-Reconciliation
Webhook payments matched instantly to billings
🟢 LIVE
Module 4
Module 4
Match Payment
1
Resident Selection
Link payment to the correct resident account
2
Billing Match
Associate with specific billing period
3
Gateway Reference
Original transaction ID preserved for audit
4
Instant DSR Update
Matched payments immediately reflect in reports
🟢 LIVE

Module 5

Structured Pipeline
Request, Clearance, Final Billing, Complete

Resident Details
Name, room, dates, and reason tracked

Action Buttons
Progress each move-out through workflow stages
4
Full Audit Trail
Every step logged with timestamps

Resident Selection

Reason Tracking

Auto-Clearance
